# FiberTools

> Free online calculators and tools for knitting, crochet, weaving, spinning, and embroidery. No login required. Works offline.

## About

FiberTools (https://fibertools.app) provides free browser-based calculators for fiber arts crafters. All tools run client-side with no accounts or data collection. The site supports offline use as a Progressive Web App.

## Tools

### Tier 1 — Essential Tools
- [Yarn Yardage Calculator](https://fibertools.app/yarn-calculator): Calculate how much yarn you need for any project — blankets, sweaters, scarves, and more.
- [Needle & Hook Size Converter](https://fibertools.app/needle-converter): Convert knitting needle and crochet hook sizes between US, UK, metric, and Japanese systems.
- [Gauge Calculator & Pattern Resizer](https://fibertools.app/gauge-calculator): Calculate gauge from a swatch, resize patterns, and get exact stitch and row counts.
- [Yarn Weight Chart & Substitution Guide](https://fibertools.app/yarn-weight-chart): Interactive yarn weight chart with substitution compatibility checker.
- [Stitch & Row Counter](https://fibertools.app/stitch-counter): Digital stitch counter with multiple counters, row reminders, and offline support.

### Tier 2 — Calculators & Generators
- [Blanket Size Calculator](https://fibertools.app/blanket-calculator): Stitch count, row count, and yardage for any blanket size from baby to king.
- [Increase & Decrease Calculator](https://fibertools.app/increase-decrease-calculator): Distribute increases or decreases evenly across a row or round.
- [Stripe Pattern Generator](https://fibertools.app/stripe-generator): Random or structured stripe patterns with per-color yardage estimates.
- [Abbreviation & Stitch Glossary](https://fibertools.app/abbreviation-glossary): Searchable glossary of 70+ knitting and crochet abbreviations.
- [Spinning Wheel Ratio Calculator](https://fibertools.app/spinning-ratio-calculator): Drive ratios, TPI, and plying ratios for handspinning.
- [Stitch Pattern Calculator](https://fibertools.app/stitch-pattern-calculator): Compatible stitch counts for sampler blankets with 50+ stitch patterns.
- [Stitch Quick Reference](https://fibertools.app/stitch-quick-reference): Visual step-by-step for every basic stitch.
- [UK to US Crochet Terms Converter](https://fibertools.app/uk-to-us-converter): Convert UK crochet patterns to US terminology and vice versa.
- [Perfect Circle Calculator](https://fibertools.app/circle-calculator): Generate flat circle crochet patterns with staggered increases.
- [Sewing & Craft Needle Guide](https://fibertools.app/needle-guide): Visual guide to needle types for every project.
- [Amigurumi Shapes Guide](https://fibertools.app/amigurumi-shapes): Round-by-round instructions for sphere, cone, cylinder, and oval shapes.

### Tier 3 — Specialty Tools
- [Cross Stitch Size & Thread Calculator](https://fibertools.app/cross-stitch-calculator): Finished dimensions and thread estimates for any fabric count.
- [Weaving Sett Calculator](https://fibertools.app/weaving-sett-calculator): Sett (EPI) for your yarn and weave structure with warp planning.
- [Project Cost Calculator](https://fibertools.app/project-cost-calculator): Total project cost including yarn, notions, and time.
- [Color Pooling Calculator](https://fibertools.app/color-pooling-calculator): Stitch count for variegated yarn pooling into argyle and plaid patterns.
- [Embroidery Thread Converter](https://fibertools.app/thread-converter): Convert between DMC, Anchor, and Cosmo thread numbers.

## Blog
- [Guides & Tutorials](https://fibertools.app/blog): Fiber arts tips, how-tos, and tool guides.
